title: nepeta racemosa subsp. racemosa
intro: Nepeta racemosa subsp. racemosa, also known as Hyssop, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Nepeta racemosa subsp. racemosa include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Nepeta racemosa subsp. racemosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make cough syrups, salves, and creams for topical application.
